spec_match.rationale: Compares the seven deprecated Intl.Locale getters to their getX() method form, exactly the spec deprecation surface.

interactive.rationale: Real <select> with 8 locales, live readout of all 7 properties under both forms; runs the API live in the visitor's browser.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Card promises a side-by-side getter vs method demo; page delivers.

edge_cases.rationale: The page captures visible deprecation warnings for getter reads and detects missing replacement methods without throwing.

references.rationale: See also includes https://chromestatus.com/feature/5148228059398144 and the TC39 proposal link.

design_system.rationale: CSS variables, deprecated card uses --accent-rose accent for the heading, no static-card pattern.

summary: Verified in chrome-devtools-mcp with Headless Chrome Canary 151 on 2026-06-06: loaded /v131/deprecate-getters-of-intl-locale-info/intl-getters/, changed locales to ar-EG and ja-JP-u-ca-japanese, confirmed the visible warning stream captured deprecated getter reads, confirmed the support note reports replacement-method availability and the method column stays usable, confirmed the ChromeStatus link, and found a clean console with no failed requests.
